positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic mountain lion's head in profile, rendered with sharp, clean lines and geometric shapes, forming an intricate tribal-inspired silhouette. The background should be negative space or a subtle, abstract geometric pattern (like fragmented constellations or stylized wind currents). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and pure white. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco graphic design and modern vector illustration, emphasizing strong, bold lines and excellent readability when printed on fabric. Central composition, highly detailed, clean silhouette, professional graphic design art.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, writing, grainy, jpeg artifacts, messy, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, realistic photo, 3d render
